instruction: Open System Settings, go to Displays, and turn the True Tone switch {STATE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 AX-tree, §7); the True Tone switch is verified from the live AX checkbox value rather than a plist read prone to cfprefsd flush lag

args: defaults write com.apple.CoreBrightness TrueToneEnabled -int {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.apple.CoreBrightness TrueToneEnabled -int {WANT}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
